headline: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
summary: Microsoft's 2026 sustainability report shows a 25% increase in carbon emissions. Total emissions reached 34 million metric tons in 2025. This rise is primarily attributed to company expansion.

headline: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
summary: Fidji Simo is stepping down as OpenAI's AGI chief due to a neuroimmune condition. She will transition to a part-time advisor role. Simo had previously taken medical leave in April.

headline: Netflix reportedly considers adding always-on channels
summary: Netflix is exploring the addition of always-on linear streaming channels. These channels would continuously stream specific shows and movies. The concept mirrors free ad-supported services like Pluto TV.

headline: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
summary: OpenAI is shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser-like AI tool. Atlas is being sunset less than a year after its launch in October. The browser was designed to perform tasks on users' behalf.

headline: Palworld Review So Far
summary: The 1.0 version of Palworld shows significant improvements. Early reviews indicate positive changes to the game. The game appears to be heading in the right direction.

headline: 'We Really Had a Good Time Making It': JK Simmons Speaks Out About Canceled Batgirl Movie
summary: JK Simmons expresses disappointment over the Batgirl movie cancellation. He enjoyed the production process of the scrapped film. Simmons shared positive sentiments despite the movie not being released.

headline: Dead by Daylight, Control, and McDonald's Are Helping Advertise Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
summary: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced is getting unusual cross-promotions. Games like Dead by Daylight and Control are participating in the advertising. Even McDonald's is involved in the promotional campaign.

headline: Save 36% Off the TP-Link Deco 7 Pro BE10000 Wi-Fi 7 Whole Home Mesh System
summary: Amazon offers 36% off the TP-Link Deco 7 Pro Wi-Fi 7 Mesh System. This is Amazon's best-selling Wi-Fi 7 router. The deal is for a whole home mesh system.

headline: Bayeux Tapestry arrives overnight at British Museum under police guard
summary: The historic Bayeux Tapestry has arrived at the British Museum. It was transported overnight under strict police guard. The famous artifact will go on display in September.

headline: Former Tory minister Ann Widdecombe dies at 78
summary: Former Conservative minister Ann Widdecombe has died at 78. She became a prominent voice for Brexit later in her career. Widdecombe had a significant political career.

headline: Police investigate Reform donations, the Times reports
summary: Police are investigating donations made to Reform UK. The inquiry focuses on gifts from the mother of convicted fraudster George Cottrell. The allegations were reported by The Times newspaper.

headline: At least 11 die in Spain wildfire as heatwave continues in Southern Europe
summary: A wildfire in Spain has claimed at least 11 lives. Four of the victims may be British citizens. The fire occurred near Los Gallardos, Almería, amidst a continuing heatwave.
